name: meeting_recap
template:
Write a recap of the meeting with three sections in this exact format:

Summary: <one to two sentences>
Decisions: <bullet list>
Action items:
- [Owner name] action item description by <date or 'TBD'>
- [Owner name] action item description by <date or 'TBD'>

Each action item MUST start with the owner's name in square brackets. If no clear owner, use [UNASSIGNED].

Transcript:
{transcript}
description: v2 enforces an explicit owner per action item (in [brackets]). Action-item lines without owners were the most common downstream complaint about v1.
